name_cn:
Celine Bonnie✨ Backpack
Simply the ultimate piece for the end of the year!
It hits the spot for me🤩
Meeting it fulfills all my fantasies💭
It pairs perfectly with the small backpack and the Maillard style🥹
It's my thing❕Love it~
It matches well with various styles of bags
Bonnie is simply the god of atmosphere!
Size: 25x18x13cm (with original packaging)
Model: 118702
